symbols.name: wreck showing any portion of hull or superstructure at level of chart datum

provenance.reference_role: judge feedback and provider refs are shape witnesses; SVG is owned redraw

symbols.repair_note: Judge rerun repair: remove the invented white aperture and redraw as the exposed wreck low hull plus sloped wreckage/mast witness.
symbols.required_change: Remove the white circular aperture and redraw closer to the S-101/OpenCPN WRECKS01 exposed-wreck silhouette: low horizontal hull plus sloped wreckage/mast, without a generic filled sail triangle.

semantic_brief.brief: WRECKS01 is wreck showing any portion of hull or superstructure at level of chart datum. It is used as a wreck showing any portion of hull or superstructure at level of chart datum. Required geometry: recognized wreck symbol, not a generic decorative icon. Required colours: reference-defined.
semantic_brief.required_shape: recognized wreck symbol, not a generic decorative icon
safety_invariants: Preserve the S-57/S-52 symbol class; do not substitute a different buoy/beacon/topmark/hazard family.
Preserve load-bearing colours and colour order.
Preserve topmark count/orientation and band pattern when present.
Use provider images as semantic/shape witnesses; Helm output remains generated-owned artwork.
semantic_brief.use_case: wreck showing any portion of hull or superstructure at level of chart datum
